ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Galilaei Galilaei Lyncei Academiae Pisanae Mathematici,
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Seren.mi magni Ducis Hetruriae Philosophi et mathematici primarij Systema Cosmicum: in quo Dialogis IV de duobus maximis Mundi Systematibus, Ptolemaico & Copernicano, rationibus utrinque propositis indefinite differitur. Accessit locorum S. Scripturae cum terrae mobilitate conciliatio
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
